selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: persistent asset-manager positioning pressure in Nasdaq-100 futures relative to S&P 500 futures is treated as an institutional allocation-flow signal favoring QQQ when it increases and SPY otherwise
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: this official derivatives-positioning flow mechanism is distinct from the permanently closed price, volatility-level, macro-state, liquidity, credit, rates, production, consumption, housing, currency, commodity and seasonal lineages

program_multiplicity.method: Bonferroni across exactly the three frozen Epoch 3 mechanisms

signal.source: CFTC Traders in Financial Futures futures-only historical compressed reports
signal.formula: for each contract compute (Asset_Mgr_Positions_Long_All-Asset_Mgr_Positions_Short_All)/Open_Interest_All; subtract the S&P 500 value from the Nasdaq-100 value; compare the latest eligible report at the current cutoff with the latest eligible report at the prior monthly cutoff
signal.target_rule: strictly positive monthly change in the relative positioning measure means QQQ weight 1.0; equal or negative change means SPY weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: ordinary reports become eligible at end-of-day America/New_York ten calendar days after report date; a documented later CFTC special-announcement publication date controls
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, contract substitution, micro/mini substitution, source blend, level threshold, alternate lag, price filter or volatility filter
signal.ancestry_limitation: CFTC trader classifications and futures positioning are imperfect proxies for equity allocation demand; the classification, relative normalization and direction are frozen economic assumptions, not conclusions learned from outcomes

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the final accepted XNYS close preceding the next monthly execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.016666666666666666 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(100000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
